name: Bobby Thomas
abstract: Bobby Thomas (Robert C. Thomas) (November 14, 1932 – October 20, 2013) was a Kittitian-American jazz drummer.

about_quotes.speaker: Hubert Laws
about_quotes.evidence: I used to bring bands in there to play the dances. He was one of the persons who played with our band: Chick, along with a bass player... and also the drummer Bobby Thomas... That was the rhythm section
about_quotes.doc_title: Hubert Laws — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Jimmy Owens
about_quotes.evidence: the drummer was Bobby Thomas or Freddie Waits or Billy Cobham... I was always there as a trumpet player.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jimmy Owens — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Monk Montgomery
about_quotes.evidence: Bobby Thomas worked with us, because he had that period away from school or whatever it was.
